items.question: What is an omnichannel customer support platform?
items.answer: An omnichannel customer support platform unifies all customer communication channels — such as WhatsApp, Instagram, email, Webchat, voice calls, Facebook, and Twitter — into a single interface. Hello offers this with integrated AI, allowing your team to handle more customers with less effort while maintaining the full history of each conversation.

items.question: How does the WhatsApp Business API integration work?
items.answer: Hello connects through the official WhatsApp Business API. You verify your business, choose or bring your number, and manage conversations from Hello's inbox — with delivery and quality metrics built in. Our team helps you go live without juggling multiple tools.

items.question: Can I automate customer service with AI?
items.answer: Yes. With Hello, you can deploy no-code chatbots, use AI-suggested replies for agents, automate routing and tagging, and scale with voice and workflow tools — so repetitive questions are handled instantly while humans focus on complex cases.

items.question: How long does it take to implement Hello?
items.answer: Many teams connect their first channels in hours. Full rollout — agents trained, automations live, WhatsApp approved — typically ranges from a few days, depending on channels, templates, and internal approvals.
